proyects.name: FrontEnd Lab - Calendar Steps Menu Chart
proyects.description: This project is a personal website that I developed for learn, develope and test frontend things. It has a calendar animated in the x value following the direction of the month change. It also has a steps container that animates the bullets and the svg path. The Menu is animated in the y value and have windows inside it. The chart is pending to be developed.The project is developed in ReactJS with Framer Motion and other hooks for measures and Dates helpers. It also uses Tailwind for the frontend style. The project is deployed in Vercel.

proyects.name: Temako Market - Star Wars SpaceShips Market
proyects.description: This project is a Star Wars Spaceships Market. It is a project that I developed for learning more about animations in frontend. The project is developed in ReactJS. It also uses Tailwind for the frontend style and Framer Motion for the animations. The project is deployed in Vercel.

proyects.name: Payment Screen - Frontend Animation
proyects.description: This project is a payment screen for the credit card data input. It is a project that I developed for learning more about frontend and animations(Framer Motion). The project is developed in ReactJS. It also uses Tailwind for the frontend style and Framer Motion for the animations. The project is deployed .

proyects.name: VAS Ecommerce Platform
proyects.description:
Ventas A Services Ecommerce is a freelance project that I developed for a client. It is a platform that allows the client to sell their products online, manage inventory and customers orders. The website have a shopping cart without payment option (client request). When a order is submited a message is sent to client Whatsapp number and continues the process manually. 

The platform is developed in NextJS. It also uses MongoDB as a database and Tailwind for the frontend style.

proyects.name: Take a Risk
proyects.description:
This was a personal project. It was a platform that allows tournaments creation and management. The website have a one click login with metamask and JWT tokens. Also, it allows payments with cryptocurrency for the tournaments joins. 

The platform was developed in NodeJS + Express with EJS for the server side rendering files. It also uses MySQL as a database and Custom CSS for the frontend style.

proyects.name: Mercado Service
proyects.description:
Personal proyect to find profesionals easier than usually and an e-commerce for profesionals stuffs. The website had typical features like shopping cart, payment methods, live chat between clients and profecionals, interactive maps and a simple login with email and password (with email checking process). 

The platform was developed in NodeJS + Express with EJS for the server side rendering files. It also uses MySQL as a database and Custom CSS for the frontend style.

proyects.name: Donatelo - Donations with cryptocurrency
proyects.description:
This one was a project public project I develop for streamers. It was a platform that allows donations with cryptocurrency. The website have a one click login with metamask and JWT tokens. It allows payments with multiple cryptocurrency in various networks. Also, manage the alerts on live streams with socket.io (websocket).  

The platform was developed in NodeJS + Express for the server and React for the frontend, also uses MongoDB as a database and daisyui + tailwindcss for the frontend style.

proyects.name: Crafteadle - Wordle like game
proyects.description: Crafteadle is a wordle like game with minecraft recipes and random inventory to craft them. The game is developed in NextJS and uses a custom API to get the recipes and inventory from a JSON file. The game is deployed in Vercel.

proyects.name: To do App with database
proyects.description: Challenge for a job application in which I had to develop a To do app with a database. The app was developed in NodeJS + Express and uses MongoDB as a database. The frontend was developed in React and uses TailwindCSS + DaisyUI for the style.

proyects.name: Axie Galaxy Guild
proyects.description:
Website for Axie Galaxy guild. With Lottery and Raffles with SLP crypto. One click login with metamask and JWT. 
The ethers.js library aims to be a complete and compact library for interacting with the Ethereum Blockchain and its ecosystem.

proyects.name: Wordle Clone (ES)
proyects.description: Clone of the Wordle website. The website is developed in React and uses the TailwindCSS library for the style. The website is deployed in Netlify.
libraries: Custom file with all the posible words

proyects.name: YT Notes - Google Chrome Extension
proyects.description: Google Chrome extension to save notes in a video. The extension is deployed in Chrome Web Store.

proyects.name: Guess Pokemon - Game challenge
proyects.description: Game challenge in which I had to develop a game in which the user had to guess the name of a pokemon. The game was developed in React and uses a custom library for the style. The game is deployed in Netlify.
libraries: TS file with the API data

proyects.name: To do App ( Gift list )
proyects.description: To do App developed in React. The app is deployed in Netlify.
